response.justification: The candidate has experience with relevant technologies and has worked on diverse projects, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Experience with event-driven systems through GISCollective
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI and fintech
No clear experience in leading a large engineering team
Not directly familiar with key technologies like LangGraph or real-time inference systems

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI
